digest.title: France Advances Europe’s AI Future With NVIDIA Technologies
digest.tldr: A year ago at NVIDIA GTC Paris at VivaTech, France laid out plans to advance local AI — from new AI factories and national compute capacity to open frontier models and industrial platforms.  Now, that AI infrastructure…
